## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check . && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy` passes (lint + types are clean).
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (or this is a pure internal refactor with no user-visible effect).
- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented.
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behaviour, usage, or public API changed.
